title: moltkia suffruticosa
intro: Moltkia suffruticosa, also known as Syrian jasmine or sweet jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Moltkia suffruticosa include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
